relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The Eternal called Noah and his house into the ark, because in a violent generation Noah still stood aligned.
The clean and the not-clean were gathered, showing that preservation held more than one kind of life.
Winged life too was preserved, so the seed of life could remain alive over the earth.
Seven days remained before the forty-day rain, the threshold before the old order dissolved.
Noah obeyed the Eternal’s command.
At six hundred years, Noah stood at the edge of the waters.
Noah and his household entered the ark before the flood overtook the earth.
Clean, not-clean, winged, and creeping life moved toward preservation.
Male and female came two by two, life paired for continuance.
After seven days, the waters came.
The deep below and the heavens above opened, as though creation’s ordered boundaries were being undone.
Rain covered the earth forty days and forty nights.
Noah, his sons, and the women of the household entered the vessel together.
Every kind of living creature entered with them, a small world gathered inside the ark.
All flesh with breath came into preservation.
The Eternal shut the ark, sealing life within protection.
The waters rose, and the ark was lifted above the earth.
The waters prevailed, and the ark moved over the face of the waters like a seed of life over chaos.
The waters covered even the high places.
The mountains disappeared beneath the flood.
All unprotected breath-bearing life on the earth expired.
The breath that had animated dry-ground life returned to silence.
The old world was wiped away, and only the ark remained as the vessel of continuity.
The waters held power over the earth for one hundred fifty days.
